title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
